n: Instance: Prisoner of the Free Peoples

steps.t: Muildir is hiding by the entrance of Delossad. Muildir is waiting to speak with you before you investigate the ruins of Delossad.
Muildir is hiding by the entrance of Delossad. You have defeated the Angmarim that returned to Delossad and should now return to Muildir.
The interior of Delossad, known as Sithad in forgotten days, is dark and gloomy. Its walls have seen great sorrow, and a heavy air hangs over all. You…
